title: Read File
description: Read a bounded slice from a local text file by path. The content field is always the exact file text slice, never prefixed with synthetic line numbers. Returns document version, encoding, EOL style, trailing-newline state, compact line metadata, truncation state, and the next line to request when more content remains.

view.description: Defaults to plain. numbered adds numbered_content as a separate rendered view; content remains exact file text.

include_line_numbers.description: Deprecated alias for include_numbered_view. When true, line numbers are returned in numbered_content; content remains exact file text.

include_numbered_view.description: When true, also return numbered_content as a separate rendered view for orientation. The content field remains exact file text.

selection.summary: Read exact local text file slices with compact line metadata for follow-up edits.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the user asks about a local file path or you need to inspect source/config text that already has a known path. Treat content as exact file text and pass version as expected_version to edit_file. Use start_line/end_line and range positions for precise edits; request view=numbered only when you need a separate orientation aid.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for directory discovery, file editing, binary files, or web pages.
